title: rubus holerythrus var. nexuosus
intro: Rubus holerythrus var. nexuosus, also known as the Korean raspberry or Korean bramble, is a variety of the Rubus holerythrus plant, a type of raspberry or blackberry native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce swelling, ease pain, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rubus holerythrus var. nexuosus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in the treatment of certain types of cancer. Rubus holerythrus var. nexuosus can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often used in traditional East Asian herbal medicine.
